messages.content:
1. I can’t wait ______ my sister again. It has been two years since we last got together.

                                                                      
4 điểm
A. to see
B. for seeing
C. seeing
A. to see

2. He should know that he is really lucky _____ such a wonderful family.

                                                                               

4 điểm
A. having
B. have
C. to have
C. to have

3. My mother was sorry _____ the concert because Kenny G was her life-time idol.

                                                         
4 điểm
A. to miss
B. for missing
C. to have missed
B. for missing

4. You seem ________ him. He hasn’t said anything since I arrived.

                                                         
4 điểm
A. to annoy
B. to have annoyed
C. to be annoying
C. to be annoying

5. This time tomorrow we’ll be celebrating because we _____ our exams.

                                         
4 điểm
A. will have finished
B. will finish
C. have finished
A. will have finished

6. I am going on holiday this Saturday so this time next week I _____ on the beach or ____ in the sea.
4 điểm
A. will lie/ swim
B. will be lying/ swimming
C. am lying/ swimming
B. will be lying/ swimming

7. We’re late. The film _______ by the time we reach the cinema.
4 điểm
A. will be starting
B. has started
C. will have started
C. will have started

8. Acupuncture, acupressure, homeopathy, aromatherapy are common examples of ______.

                                        
4 điểm
A. Western medicine
B. supplementary medicine
C. alternative medicine
C. alternative medicine

9. I don’t know much about his ability as a doctor, but from what I’ve seen, I think he has a very good ______.

                                                
4 điểm
A. bedside manner
B. bedside behavior
C. bedside reaction
A. bedside manner

10. When you are smart, level-headed, and able to understand and assess a situation, this is an example of having a lot of _____.

                                          
4 điểm
A. common sense
B. common knowledge
C. common ability
A. common sense

11. Since it has become _____ to use pesticides when growing vegetables and fruits, land and water has been increasingly polluted.

                                                                     
4 điểm
A. well-known
B. conventional
C. traditional
B. conventional

12. My little son has formed a habit of making ______ decisions, which is rather rare for children at his age. He never does anything without gathering some information about it first.

                                                                            
4 điểm
A. good
B. sensible
C. informed
C. informed

13. We tried to get your points ______, but he was so aggressive that he disregarded what we said.

                                                                                    
4 điểm
A. by
B. across
C. over
C. over

We tried to get your points ______, but he was so aggressive that he disregarded what we said.

                                                                                    
4 điểm
A. by
B. across
C. over
C. over
